basic_details.job_title: RRB NTPC Graduate 05/2024 Final Result 2026 OUT (Direct Link) - Download Scorecard @ rrbcdg.gov.in
basic_details.short_information: Quick Summary: Railway Recruitment Boards (RRBs) have released RRB NTPC Graduate 05/2024 Final Result 2026 on 7th May 2026 at respective regional official portals. Candidates can download the provisional shortlist/merit list PDF for Document Verification (DV) & Medical Examination using Roll Number. Check shortlisted candidates, cutoff, and next process below.

important_instructions: ✓ Download and print the shortlist PDF ✓ Keep original documents ready for DV ✓ Appear for Medical Examination as scheduled ✓ Verify all details carefully ✓ Regularly check official RRB website for DV schedule
